authorization_modes.authorized-local-export: User selects or provides a local export, folder, ZIP, workbook, saved page, or read-only copied file.
authorization_modes.authorized-mailbox-or-export: User registers a mailbox through password_env or provides a local email export.
authorization_modes.browser-history-or-export: User provides a copied browser history database or a platform usage export.
authorization_modes.lake-lens: FinClaw runs the lens only after the upstream collector has written authorized Lake events.
authorization_modes.local-database-readonly: User authorizes a local application data store or decrypted/readable database path.
authorization_modes.local-scan-readonly: Collector scans a user-authorized local application or filesystem scope without mutation.
authorization_modes.local-ui-readonly: User logs in and unlocks the local application; collector reads visible/local data without order mutation.
authorization_modes.managed-oauth-snapshot: FinClaw-managed OAuth or equivalent connection is completed before scheduled snapshot collection.

product_surfaces.guarded-production: May be exposed as a guarded user-facing collector after the stated preflight is satisfied.
product_surfaces.deep-beta: May be exposed to beta users with explicit caveats and gap states.
product_surfaces.import-beta: May be exposed as an authorized import or local-scan beta collector.
product_surfaces.lens-beta: May be exposed only as a downstream lens after its upstream Lake exists.
product_surfaces.managed-oauth-beta: May be exposed after managed authorization infrastructure is available.
product_surfaces.supporting-beta: May support investor workflows but is not a primary investor P0/P1/P2 source.

evidence_roles.attention-universe: Self-selected symbols, watchlists, follows, or attention pools that must be corroborated by trades, holdings, notes, or research.
evidence_roles.information-usage: User reading, search, subscription, alert, or information-source traces.
evidence_roles.investor-lens: Filtered investment evidence derived from upstream personal Lake events.
evidence_roles.partial-asset-facts: Authorized asset or wealth facts that remain partial until full account boundary validation.
evidence_roles.personal-channel-lake: Generic personal channel evidence that should enter Lake before investor lens classification.
evidence_roles.planning-context: Task, calendar, reminder, or planning evidence for trade/research discipline.
evidence_roles.research-material: Authorized research-document evidence and explicit content extraction outputs.
evidence_roles.strong-trade-asset-facts: Broker or trading-app facts such as assets, positions, executions, orders, and fund flows.
evidence_roles.supporting-communication: Supporting communication evidence that needs an investor lens before Wiki use.
evidence_roles.weak-influence: Weak social influence evidence that requires corroboration and cannot stand alone as an investment conclusion.
evidence_roles.workflow-metadata: Professional terminal workflow metadata without vendor database or licensed content mirroring.
evidence_roles.workflow-metadata-and-intensity: Professional terminal workflow metadata plus query/export/object-count intensity summaries without vendor database or licensed content mirroring.

contracts.user_step: Log in to EastMoney and unlock the trading page; CollectorX reads local files and visible trading tables only. Optional filters can narrow by event kind, symbol, account, source, or keyword.
contracts.preflight: EastMoney is installed, the user is logged in, and the read-only trading UI can be reached; optional event scope filters are applied before Lake output and can return a validator-safe scope_policy_filtered_all gap package with zero usable business events.

contracts.user_step: Authorize a local Tonghuashun scan or open an unlocked read-only trading screen; optionally narrow collection by event type, symbol, account, source, or keyword.
contracts.preflight: Tonghuashun local data or visible trading UI is available without requesting a trading password; optional event scope filters are applied before Lake output and can return a scope_policy_filtered_all gap event.

contracts.user_step: Authorize a local Tonghuashun data root for read-only watchlist scanning; exported files can still be imported through --input as a fallback. Optional allow/deny scope parameters can narrow symbols, markets, groups, industries, tags, keywords, source paths, or source platforms.
contracts.preflight: The root or export is user-owned Tonghuashun watchlist evidence and not a trade, holding, order, or fund-flow source; no-input and filtered-all runs emit validator-safe profile gap packages with can_enter_finclaw=false.

contracts.user_step: Authorize local WeChat collection and provide required readable database/key preconditions.
contracts.preflight: Run wechat_query.py --diagnose to get machine-readable local-source readiness before collection. WeChat local store must be readable for the supported platform; no decrypted keys are written to output. In --collect --out-dir mode, missing db/key preconditions or zero retained messages produce a validator-safe data-quality gap package with zero usable message events.

contracts.user_step: Run after WeChat Lake exists, optionally narrowing to user-approved chats or senders.
contracts.preflight: Upstream wechat events.jsonl exists and source-policy allow/deny rules are explicit when used.

contracts.user_step: Select an authorized root folder for metadata-only scanning; optionally narrow by extension, path, file name, directory name, or metadata keyword.
contracts.preflight: Root exists, optional filesystem scope-policy allow/deny rules are explicit when used, and the user understands file bodies are not read by the generic collector; missing/no-retained metadata produces a validator-safe data-quality gap package routed to collectorx.data_quality.collection_gaps with can_enter_filesystem_lake=false, can_enter_data_quality_lake=true, can_feed_research_documents_lens=false, and can_feed_investor_wiki_directly=false.

contracts.user_step: Run on authorized research folders or upstream file/note Lake events; optionally narrow by extension, path, file name, parser, research surface, or keyword; content extraction requires explicit flags.
contracts.preflight: Research inputs are user-selected, optional document scope-policy allow/deny rules are explicit when used, body/OCR extraction choices are explicit, and no-input/no-readable/no-match/filtered-all states produce data-quality gap packages rather than successful empty evidence.

contracts.user_step: Register an IMAP account through password_env, authorize a local mailbox root for read-only scanning, or provide a local email export; optionally narrow by mailbox, folder, sender, sender domain, recipient, subject, attachment name, or keyword.
contracts.preflight: Run `python3 skills/email-collector/scripts/email_api.py preflight --diagnose [--email <mailbox>] [--platform auto|mac|windows|linux|generic] [--local-root <authorized-root>] [--diagnose-out <json>]` to determine whether IMAP credentials or a user-owned local mail root are ready without logging into IMAP or reading mail content; mailbox credentials are referenced by environment variable, or a user-owned local mail root/export is selected; optional email scope filters are applied before Lake output; missing accounts/exports, no-message windows, collection failures, and filtered-all scope return validator-safe profile gap packages; manifest readiness separates email Lake, data-quality Lake, and email-research lens gates.

contracts.user_step: Run after email Lake exists to classify broker research, morning meetings, roadshows, IR mail, earnings alerts, and attachment signals; optionally narrow by sender, sender domain, folder, mailbox, subject, attachment filename, email surface, or keyword.
contracts.preflight: Upstream email events.jsonl exists; optional email-research scope filters are explicit when used; full-body Wiki inclusion and attachment-body collection remain false by default; missing input, unreadable input, no investment match, or filtered-all scope emit validator-safe profile gap packages routed to data-quality collection gaps; manifest readiness separates retained email-research facts from gap events.

contracts.user_step: Provide an authorized Xueqiu watchlist export or package; optionally choose symbol, market, group, industry, tag, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is a user-owned Xueqiu watchlist export; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; no-input and filtered-all runs emit validator-safe profile gap packages routed to collectorx.data_quality.collection_gaps with can_enter_finclaw=false, can_enter_xueqiu_watchlist_lake=false, can_enter_data_quality_lake=true, and are not treated as broker holdings.

contracts.user_step: Provide an authorized Xueqiu activity export, ZIP, saved page, workbook, browser-network HAR, or copied Chromium/Safari browser history file; optionally choose activity, source surface, source app, domain, symbol, author, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Run `python3 skills/xueqiu-investor-activity/scripts/xueqiu_activity.py diagnose --input <authorized-source> [--scan-browser-profiles] [--diagnose-out <json>] [--out-dir <gap-package>]` before collection when FinClaw needs readiness; diagnosis does not parse HAR response payloads into events, does not emit browser-history URLs/titles, cookies, tokens, local paths, or phone numbers, and can only produce a data-quality gap package. Collection input belongs to the user; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; HAR parsing excludes request secrets, browser-history parsing is domain-filtered to xueqiu.com; no-input, preflight-only, and filtered-all runs emit validator-safe profile gap packages routed to collectorx.data_quality.collection_gaps with can_enter_finclaw=false, can_enter_xueqiu_activity_lake=false, can_enter_data_quality_lake=true, and neither path is treated as broker trade evidence.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized fund, wealth, cash-management, bank wealth, workbook, PDF, ZIP, or HAR exports; optionally choose platform, account, subtype, product code/name, currency, side, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is read-only and user-owned; source preflight records supported/unsupported file surfaces without treating unsupported files as asset facts; every candidate asset, holding, cash-management, or cashflow record must satisfy the minimum field contract before entering the China wealth Lake; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; no-input, unsupported-source, filtered-all, and field-contract-rejected results emit validator-safe profile gap packages routed to collectorx.data_quality.collection_gaps with can_enter_finclaw=false when no usable records remain; passwords, consumption flows, and account mutation are out of scope.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized meeting minutes, transcripts, subtitles, platform exports, or ZIP packages; optionally choose source-platform, participant, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Meeting artifact files are user-selected; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; attachment/recording bodies are not assumed; missing input or filtered-all scope produces a validator-safe profile gap package.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized DingTalk collaboration exports or ZIP packages; optionally choose source-platform, record-kind, chat, sender, participant, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is user-authorized; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; credentials and file bodies are excluded unless explicitly handled by another collector; missing input or filtered-all scope produces a validator-safe profile gap package.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized WeCom collaboration exports or ZIP packages; optionally choose source-platform, record-kind, chat, sender, participant, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is user-authorized; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; credentials and file bodies are excluded unless explicitly handled by another collector; missing input or filtered-all scope produces a validator-safe profile gap package.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized Feishu exports or use the registered read-only Feishu tooling where available.
contracts.preflight: Workspace scope is user-authorized and tenant/app secrets are not written to output; missing input or no readable records produce validator-safe data-quality gap packages with can_enter_feishu_lake=false, can_enter_data_quality_lake=true, downstream lens gates false, and can_feed_investor_wiki_directly=false.

contracts.user_step: Run after meeting or collaboration Lake exists to classify investment meetings and decision surfaces.
contracts.preflight: Upstream meeting/collaboration events.jsonl exists and recording-body authorization is explicit if used.

contracts.user_step: Provide an authorized note vault, Notion/Youdao/Evernote export, table export, or ZIP package; optionally provide source-app, path/notebook, or tag allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is user-selected; note source-policy filters are applied before Lake output when provided; full-content inclusion remains explicit; missing input or filtered-all authorization scope produces a validator-safe profile gap package.

contracts.user_step: Run after notes Lake exists to classify investment reviews, rules, checklists, and valuation assumptions.
contracts.preflight: Upstream notes events.jsonl exists and note allowlists are applied when needed.

contracts.user_step: Connect TickTick/Dida through FinClaw-managed OAuth before scheduled SoulMirror snapshots run; for offline authorized exports, optionally provide source-app, project/list, tag, or keyword allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Managed OAuth broker or token environment is available; collection path does not start OAuth itself; offline task scope filters are applied before helper output when provided; offline missing input or filtered-all scope produces a profile gap event without writing daemon-owned Lake.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized calendar ICS, JSON, CSV, TSV, or ZIP exports; optionally provide source-platform, calendar, attendee, or keyword allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Calendar input is user-selected; calendar scope filters are applied before Lake output when provided; time-quality checks run when enough time fields exist; missing input or filtered-all scope produces a validator-safe profile gap package.

contracts.user_step: Run after task or calendar Lake exists to classify investment plans, review reminders, and research tasks.
contracts.preflight: Upstream task/calendar events.jsonl exists; scope-policy audits, timezone/recurrence caveats, and task/calendar boundary proof are visible.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized WeChat favorites, saved article files, folders, or ZIP packages; optionally choose source-account, account-type, action, tag, domain, and keyword allow/deny scope filters.
contracts.preflight: Input is user-selected; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output and do not imply public-account platform-wide scraping; missing, no-readable, and filtered-all runs produce validator-safe data-quality gap packages with can_enter_wechat_favorites_lake=false, can_enter_data_quality_lake=true, can_feed_wechat_article_favorites_lens=false, and can_feed_investor_wiki_directly=false.

contracts.user_step: Run after WeChat favorites Lake exists to classify investment articles and reading actions.
contracts.preflight: Upstream favorites events.jsonl exists and account/tag allowlists are explicit when used.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized finance-news usage exports, saved pages, ZIP packages, copied browser history, or ZIP-packaged History.db members; optionally choose platform, action, source-app, domain, topic, or keyword allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Only CLS, WallstreetCN, Gelonghui, or whitelisted finance-news usage traces are parsed; browser-history inputs are domain-filtered and source-app counted; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output and can return a traceable financial_news_scope_policy_filtered_all gap package routed to collectorx.data_quality.collection_gaps with can_enter_finclaw=false, can_enter_financial_news_usage_lake=false, can_enter_data_quality_lake=true, and can_feed_investor_wiki_evidence=false.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized read-only Futu, Tiger, or IBKR statements, exports, workbooks, or ZIP packages; optionally choose broker, account, subtype, symbol, market, currency, or keyword allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Brokerage input is read-only and user-owned; no order mutation or trading password is requested; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; no-input and filtered-all runs emit validator-safe profile gap packages routed to collectorx.data_quality.collection_gaps with can_enter_finclaw=false, can_enter_hk_us_brokerage_lake=false, can_enter_data_quality_lake=true, and can_feed_investor_wiki_evidence=false.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized Wind, Choice, iFinD, or Bloomberg workflow metadata exports with available query, export, workspace, template, dataset, and field metadata; optionally choose terminal, activity, workspace, project, dataset, field, or keyword allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Input contains personal workflow metadata and workflow intensity metadata only, not vendor database mirrors or licensed content bodies; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; no-input and filtered-all runs emit validator-safe profile gap packages routed to collectorx.data_quality.collection_gaps with can_enter_finclaw=false, can_enter_pro_terminal_usage_lake=false, can_enter_data_quality_lake=true, and can_feed_investor_wiki_evidence=false.

contracts.user_step: Provide authorized Weibo, Bilibili, or Xiaohongshu activity exports, saved pages, workbooks, ZIP packages, or copied Chromium/Safari browser history files; optionally choose platform, action, source-app, domain, creator, topic, or keyword allow/deny filters.
contracts.preflight: Social traces and browser-history copies are domain-filtered weak influence only and cannot become standalone investment conclusions; optional scope filters are applied before Lake output; no-input and filtered-all runs emit validator-safe profile gap packages routed to collectorx.data_quality.collection_gaps with can_enter_finclaw=false, can_enter_social_activity_lake=false, can_enter_data_quality_lake=true, can_feed_social_investment_lens=false, and can_feed_investor_wiki_directly=false.

contracts.user_step: Run after social activity Lake exists, optionally narrowing weak influence evidence by platform, action, source app, domain, creator, social topic, or keyword.
contracts.preflight: Upstream social-activity events.jsonl exists and upstream can_feed_social_investment_lens=true; optional social influence scope filters are explicit when used; pure upstream gap packages and filtered-all lens packages route to collectorx.data_quality.collection_gaps and must not become influence facts; retained lens evidence sets can_enter_social_investment_influence_lake=true and can_feed_investor_wiki_evidence=true, but stronger trade/research corroboration is still required.

contracts.user_step: Authorize a local readable or decrypted QQ NT store before running the supporting communication collector.
contracts.preflight: QQ database path is readable; passphrases and decrypted keys are not written to output.
